name: DBT Druckluft
message: In 1991, DBT Compressed Air and Construction Machinery GmbH was founded in Neuss and, after constant expansion, has now moved into its second new building in Korschenbroich.As one of the leading providers of compressed air systems of all sizes, we are the competent partner for large-scale industry and medium-sized companies. From the initial installation to the maintenance and repair.Tel 02182.69751-00Fax 02182.69751-29info(at)dbt-gmbh.de
